title: Teacher augmentation via OpenRouter for small datasets
acceptance_criteria: For datasets < 200 pairs, uses teacher model to paraphrase inputs
completion_summary: Augment expands datasets below MinTarget (200) via OpenRouter chat API. Generates lexically-varied input paraphrases; preserves OutputText verbatim. MaxParaphrases cap per record prevents runaway expansion. API failures are non-fatal per record. 7 tests pass: above-target skip, expansion, empty input error, max cap, API key required, API error resilience, output preservation.
